auditor: Claude Code (Stream H forensic read-only audit)

life_events.description_keyword_note: All 36 event descriptions contain expected key phrases from source markdown. EVT.2008.06.09.01 was initially flagged for 'June 9, 2008' keyword but this phrase does not appear in the markdown description either — not a truncation.
life_events.date_handling_note: Year-approx events (e.g. EVT.1995.XX.XX.01) stored as YYYY-01-01; month-exact events (e.g. EVT.2001.03.XX.01) stored as YYYY-MM-01; exact events stored as YYYY-MM-DD. EVT.CURRENT.01 date stored as 2026-04-01 (month-floor of 2026-04-17 exact date in markdown — acceptable approximation).
life_events.chart_state_json_validity: All 36 chart_state fields are valid non-empty JSON objects
life_events.event_id_coverage: All 36 event IDs from markdown (EVT.1984.02.05.01 through EVT.CURRENT.01) present in DB

sade_sati_phases.cycle_distribution_note: cycle=0 corresponds to 'Pre-Birth' in markdown source (three historical pre-birth Sade Sati windows: ~1902-1910, ~1931-1939, ~1961-1969). cycle=1-4 correspond to Cycles 1-4 in markdown. All 46 rows verified row-by-row against markdown table; zero mismatches in cycle_number, phase, start_date, end_date, or saturn_sign_at_start.
sade_sati_phases.row_by_row_verification: All 46 rows matched exactly against markdown source (dates, cycle numbers, phases, signs). No data quality issues found.

notes: Both tables faithfully represent their source markdown files.
Approximate dates are handled consistently: year-only events use YYYY-01-01, month-known events use YYYY-MM-01.
The Pre-Birth Sade Sati group (20 rows across three historical cycles) is stored as cycle_number=0, consistent with the 'Pre-Birth' label in the markdown.
No data quality defects found. Migration of these two tables is verified clean.
